title: polypodium elongatum
intro: Polypodium elongatum, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Polypodium elongatum include protecting the skin from damage caused by UV radiation, reducing inflammation and pain, and potentially preventing certain diseases such as cancer and neurodegenerative disorders. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as creams, ointments, and capsules, and can also be found in some skincare products due to its protective properties against environmental stressors.
